/usr/lib/icecc/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock_main.so -o ../../lib/libgmock_main.so CMakeFiles/gmock_main.dir/src/gmock_main.cc.o -Wl,-rpath,/home/miles/Dropbox/code/memepu/verymeme/build/lib: ../../lib/libgmock.so ../../lib/libgtest.so -pthread
